verifier.py lines 64-71: Awards 20 points if result.get('output_exists') and result.get('file_created_during_task')
verifier.py lines 100-102: Awards 40 points if VLM confirms data.get('rug_visible')
verifier.py lines 104-106: Awards 30 points if VLM confirms data.get('is_area_rug')

privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan is a real 2D/3D home design software by NCH Software supporting floor editing and texture manipulation. The task requires creating an area rug in the living room of the Contemporary House sample project with a distinct carpet texture. Scoring criteria verified from verifier.py: 20 points for file existence/creation timestamp, 40 points for rug visibility, 30 points for area rug confirmation (visible border), 10 points for distinct texture (VLM verification). CRITICAL ISSUE: Task references missing setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 scripts that are required to run the task and generate the result JSON expected by the verifier.
